retrieved_result: Dog agility "From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedianavigation search A hairless Chinese Crested taking part in an agility competition. Dog agility is a dog sport in which a handler directs a dog through an obstacle course in a race for both time and accuracy. Dogs run off leash with no food or toys as incentives"
